title: Coinbase Stock Forecast and Analyst Consensus
text: Wall Street analysts issued 19 Buy recommendations and 10 Hold recommendations out of 34 total in January 2026, with price targets averaging $341 compared to mid-January price of $223. More recently, analysts maintain bullish consensus with median price target of $227.00 ranging from $120.00 to $420.00, with overall analyst rating of Strong Buy. Bernstein projects 23% earnings-per-share growth for Coinbase in 2026, underpinned by stablecoin expansion, derivatives, and prediction markets. Significant margin compression observed with revenue growing 9.69% while expenses grew 35%, a trend requiring reversal in 2026 for bull thesis to hold. Coinbase Everything Exchange strategy addresses margin compression by enabling users who come for crypto to stay for broader financial platform.
